allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''''fs''''\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''', ''''utf8''''\)\); const errors = data.filter\(r => r.severity === 2\); const warnings = data.filter\(r => r.severity === 1\); console.log\(''''ERRORS:'''', errors.length\); console.log\(''''WARNINGS:'''', warnings.length\); console.log\(''''FILES:'''', new Set\(errors.map\(e => e.filePath\)\).size\);")
